phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è il banco per ordinare, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH eel BAN-koh per oor-dee-NAH-reh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Here at the counter, on the left.

responses.english: Here at the counter, on the left.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa questa torta, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh KWAN-toh KOS-tah KWES-tah TOR-tah per fa-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Il costo è indicato sul vassoio.
likely_response.pronunciation: EEL KOH-stoh È een-dee-KAH-toh SOOL vah-ssoh-EE-oh
likely_response.translation_en: The cost is indicated on the tray.

responses.english: The cost is indicated on the tray.
responses.phonetic: EEL KOH-stoh È een-dee-KAH-toh SOOL vah-ssoh-EE-oh
responses.french: Il costo è indicato sul vassoio.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora aprite, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh, ah kay OH-rah ah-PREE-tay, pehr fah-VOH-ray

likely_response.translation_en: We open at eight in the morning.

responses.english: We open at eight in the morning.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, avete scatole regalo, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah-VEH-teh SKAH-toh-leh reh-GAH-loh, per fah-VOH-reh
